presets.name: Concrete Gallery
presets.description: A broad concrete gallery with offset stone branches and restrained irregularity.

presets.name: Wood Studio
presets.description: A compact wood room with a damped architectural annex and controlled tail.

presets.name: Limestone Pocket
presets.description: A rough limestone pocket with smaller cave branches and dense directional scatter.

presets.name: Ice Grotto
presets.description: A reflective ice grotto opening into a water-worn cavern pocket.

presets.name: Deep Stone Vault
presets.description: A tall stone vault with long coupled cavern returns and a sparse exterior leak.

presets.name: Water Chamber
presets.description: A wide cavern whose wet chamber network brightens and disperses the early field.

presets.name: Brick Bend
presets.description: A bent brick passage with narrow axial returns and one architectural side room.

presets.name: Metal Conduit
presets.description: A tight metallic conduit with nested tunnel continuations and focused axial energy.

presets.name: Dry Slot
presets.description: A narrow dry slot with tall stone walls, open sky, and sparse delayed returns.

presets.name: Porous Gorge
presets.description: A broad porous gorge with cave recesses and strongly thinned late energy.

presets.name: Forest Ring
presets.description: An open vegetation ring with low boundary pockets and diffuse distant scatter.

presets.name: Water Meadow
presets.description: A wet open field with water and vegetation boundaries plus a few cave-like hollows.

presets.name: Folded Chamber
presets.description: An irregular folded field whose connected regions alternate between ordinary and impossible spaces.

presets.name: Impossible Network
presets.description: A high-contrast network of mixed spatial families, materials, scales, and coupling paths.
